location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (src/sync.py:14, :24, :35, :38; src/report.py:5, :11).

interaction_synthesis.why: The line 38 finding mechanistically explains the compound mode: the bare `pass` swallows the line 35 SQL failure so 'a user whose email breaks the query is neither synced nor logged nor traceable, so failures become invisible.'

causal_clarity.why: Each finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. `seen=[]` 'is created once and shared across every call, so after the first call records N ids the same list persists into the next call and skips all previously-seen ids.'
